posts.author: malamus (matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I have moved from Asana to Monday.com

Can I create a task in monday.com from outlook as can be done with Asana?

From my research it seems Monday will bring in ALL emails from outlook but I would like the option that Asana has, screen shot attached, where by one click on an email created the task and attaches any files

Thank you
